Per actualno.com / trud.bg coverage: 54.1% decided to vote, 17.3% will vote but undecided on party, 11.3% likely to vote but uncertain about participation, 15.6% will not vote, 1.8% no answer. Methodology: two-stage stratified sampling, MOE ±3.1% at 50%. Commissioned for use by various Bulgarian press.
Stored wontVote 29.4% and otherNamedMinor 6.8% match primary source. Stored sum 47.8 is correct as % of eligible voters with parties at ≥1% remainder going to non-vote bucket.
Stored undecided 2.4% and wontVote 26.3% are reasonable carry-overs from earlier Gallup wave with similar structure.

residual.notes: Earliest pre-2017-election wave (~10 weeks out, superseded by tr-2017-03-16 for analyzer scoring). Shares are "спонтанен отговор / процент от гласуващите" — no show-card. ДСБ shown separately at 1.2% (later folded into РБ-ГН for the ballot).
